title: Carolina Classic - April 16-19
content:
# Carolina Classic - April 16-19

[Registration full, waitlist available!](/index.php/events/event-listings/bonspiels/397-2026-carolina-classic)  
Join us in the Triangle April 16-19 for our signature open bonspiel!

* $480 per team
* 32-team open format
* 3-game guarantee
* First draw: 6:30 P.M. on Thursday. Last draw: 1:30 P.M. on Sunday.
* All meals (Thursday dinner through Sunday lunch) included.
* Beer, wine, and soda available at our cashless bar (only credit cards and mobile payments accepted).
* All draws will be live streamed online - [www.youtube.com/trianglecurling](https://www.youtube.com/trianglecurling)
* Questions? [contact email]

### Triangle Club Teams

* Maxiumum of 3 Triangle Curling Club teams
* Teams will be selected via a random lottery on March 8, 2026.
* Any team with 3 or more Triangle Curling members is considered a Triangle team.
* **Do not register on the website.** To be entered into the lottery, send your full team roster to [contact email] before March 7, 2026.

### Where

Triangle Curling Club  
2310 So Hi Drive  
Durham, NC 27703

Fly into RDU airport, less than 15 minutes from Triangle Curling Club.

### Host Hotel

**Information coming soon**

### Payment and Cancellation Policy

Payment is required upon registration. PayPal is our payments provider, which accepts all major credit cards from most countries.

Cancellations received before March 26th will be processed and you will receive a full refund. Cancellations received between March 26th and April 9th will be processed, and you will receive a full refund if we are able to find a replacement team. Cancellations received after April 9th will be processed, but you will not receive any refund.

### Explore the Area!

* [Food and Wine Mag: Explores the Triangle ](https://www.foodandwine.com/research-triangle-north-carolina-what-to-eat-and-drink-7108205)
* [Ultimate Durham Checklist](https://durhammag.com/the-ultimate-durham-checklist/)
* [Duke Gardens](https://gardens.duke.edu/)
* [Durham: Kingdom of Cool](https://www.atlantamagazine.com/southbound-articles/durham-north-carolina/)
* [Discover Durham: Beer Scene](https://www.discoverdurham.com/food-drink/breweries/)

### Questions?

Your 2026 Carolina Classic co-chairs are Sara Emley and John Stanley. Please reach out if you have any questions.  
[contact email]
